title: Tornado Cash - Open App
meta_description: tornado cash privacy protocol: verify the official app, review supported EVM pools, and open app.tornado.cash with compliance in mind.
hero_h2: Private EVM Transfers With zk Proofs
hero_lead: Tornado Cash is a non-custodial EVM privacy protocol that uses smart contracts and zk-SNARK proofs to separate deposit and withdrawal activity while keeping users in control of assets.
what_is: Tornado Cash is a decentralized, non-custodial privacy protocol for Ethereum and other EVM networks, described in the official documentation as using smart contracts to improve transaction privacy.

how.d: Open only the documented app domain and compare it with official sources before connecting a wallet.
Check the current app for available networks, assets, fixed-amount pools, and any Nova options before taking action.
Use a wallet only where your transaction is lawful, understood, and compatible with your compliance obligations.
Preserve transaction records and any app-generated recovery material, because loss or misuse can affect access to funds.

points.p: Users interact with smart contracts directly; the protocol is not designed to take custody of wallet assets.
zk-SNARK proofs support private withdrawals, but privacy is not absolute and user behavior can still create traceable links.
The U.S. Treasury announced a Tornado Cash delisting on March 21, 2025, while warning users to exercise caution around risky transactions.

faq.a: Tornado Cash is a non-custodial privacy protocol for EVM assets that uses smart contracts and zero-knowledge proofs to reduce public linkage between deposits and withdrawals.
No. Tornado Cash is not a DEX or token swap; it is a privacy tool, so users should verify the app flow and legal obligations before interacting.

faq.q: What is the official Tornado Cash app?
faq.a: The official Classic app entry point referenced by the docs is app.tornado.cash; verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: Is Tornado Cash legal to use?
faq.a: Legal treatment varies by jurisdiction and transaction context; the U.S. Treasury delisted economic sanctions on March 21, 2025, but users remain responsible for compliance.

faq.q: Which networks does Tornado Cash support?
faq.a: The docs describe deployments across Ethereum and several EVM networks; confirm current network and token support inside the official app before using it.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify app.tornado.cash and local rules. Educational content only, not financial advice.
